title: Mere Sai
desc: Keshav's mother is worried when she finds him unconscious. Later, she learns about Keshav's alcohol addiction from Abdul.

title: Shree Brahma Vishnu Mahesh
desc: The Hindu deities, Lord Brahma, Lord Vishnu and Lord Shiva, represent the creation, preservation and destruction of the universe respectively, to lead humanity to enlightenment.

title: Maa Shakti
desc: Maa Shakti, a divine goddess in Hinduism, transforms herself in various forms and uses her power to bring balance to the universe.

title: Jai Ganga Maiya
desc: Ganga, a living river goddess born from the divine feet of Lord Vishnu, preserved in the Kamandal of Brahma and sustained in his locks by Shiva, descends to Earth due to Bhagiratha's penance.

title: Shree Krishna
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Ramayan
desc: Prince Rama and Lakshmana enlist monkey allies to save Sita. Later, they embark on a quest to rescue her from Ravana, Lanka's demon king.

title: Om Namah Shivay
desc: Shiva, the creator god in Hindu mythology, sets off the creation of the universe which then leads to the formation of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

title: Karmaadhikaari Shanidev
desc: Shanidev navigates through the crevices of life, he learns lessons and grows as an individual to become the God of karma.

title: Maharana Pratap
desc: Maharana Pratap becomes an able ruler after getting inspired by his mother's teachings.

title: Jai Bhairavnath
desc: Bhairavnath, village protector and Shiva's commander, undergoes a transformation after marrying Jogeshwari. This union softens his destructive nature.

title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
desc: Mahadev is dejected as Parvati has taken a decision in haste and chose to abandon him. Tears roll down Mahadev's eyes as he begins to remember Parvati.
